pageContext.name: Fashion Accident "Def Notez" SuperJanky
pageContext.description: Janky's SECOND EVER Fashion Accident has arrived and he's got his EYEZ on tha PRIZE. Fashion Accident Def Notez is 8' of GLOWING vinyl with enough dilated peepers to see every version of the future (SPOILER ALERT: they all end in getting MESSED UP)  With an emotional support paddle for swatting away FEELINGS and designer DEADphones for keeping the world on MUTE, this lil' accident is anything butt a mistake.
